title: anemone yamatutae
intro: Anemone yamatutae, also known as Anemone japonica var. yamatutae, is a perennial plant species native to Japan, belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. The roots and rhizomes of Anemone yamatutae have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Anemone yamatutae is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, and it is also used in some traditional Japanese medicines.
